meta.title: GastroHub | Restaurant ordering app, admin & website
meta.description: GastroHub is a modern ordering and restaurant platform for delivery, menu management, customer accounts and a mobile owner dashboard. No dependency on third-party platforms, full control over your data.

hero.subline: GastroHub is your own ordering platform. You keep your guests, your brand and a much bigger share of every order, without depending on delivery apps.

valueprop.title: Why GastroHub for restaurants?
valueprop.subtitle: One platform for your restaurant website, app version, menu management and owner dashboard.
valueprop.card1_body: Your guests order directly with you, with no detour through delivery apps and no high commissions.
valueprop.card2_body: Your prices, your rules, your customer data. Ideal for restaurants that want to sell independently and professionally.
valueprop.card3_body: Menu, photos and orders are set up in two to four weeks and ready to use right after.

features.title: All key features in one place
features.subtitle: From first contact to live orders, GastroHub covers the entire flow. Three pricing models, you choose the one that fits your restaurant.
features.ki_text: One click from the admin dashboard: the AI drafts the full order to your supplier as email or WhatsApp, in the language you choose. Saves time every day and prevents typos.
features.website_text: Your own ordering page with your brand, menu and direct ordering path, no detour through third-party platforms.
features.menu_text: Categories, variants, allergens, photos and daily specials, all maintained by you, no technical skills needed.
features.order_text: From cart through delivery or pickup to confirmation, everything runs from one place and is mobile-optimised.
features.account_text: Login, order history, saved addresses, payment methods and wishlist for returning guests.
features.admin_text: Accept orders, manage menu, delivery zones, opening hours, coupons and staff, all from your phone.
features.lang_text: Available in German, English, Arabic and Turkish, more languages on request.
features.mobile_text: Your guests order on smartphone, tablet or desktop, no app install needed.
features.pay_text: Online payments via Stripe (credit card, PayPal) and optional cash on delivery or pickup.
features.law_text: Imprint, terms, privacy policy and a GDPR-compliant cookie notice are built in.
features.contact_text: Email, phone and demo booking, for direct enquiries without detours.

comparison.title: Platform fees in comparison
comparison.subtitle: See for yourself, and work out what you save per year.
comparison.savings_text: With industry-standard platform commissions, monthly revenues in the five-figure range can mean substantial costs, which GastroHub reduces significantly.
comparison.savings_text2: With GastroHub you pay {{strong}}, and keep the rest.
comparison.disclaimer: * Comparison values reflect publicly reported rates of major delivery platforms in Germany. Exact rates vary by contract, region, and platform. § 6 UWG.

pricing.title: Flexible pricing models
pricing.subtitle: Three models, all with a 12-month minimum term. Choose the one that fits your restaurant.
pricing.footnote: All prices depend on restaurant size and requirements, talk to us.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: We've made the process as straightforward as possible. You focus on cooking, we focus on the tech.
how.step1_body: Drop us a short message. We'll discuss your setup and the right pricing model, no commitment and no cost.
how.step2_body: We import your existing menu or help you build out your dishes.
how.step3_body: Start selling through your own website and manage orders in the dashboard.
how.illustration_subtitle: We walk you through the setup

final_cta.title: Your restaurant. Your orders.
final_cta.subline: Choose the model that fits, significantly cheaper than major delivery apps, no dependence on third-party platforms.
